name: Podcast Scriptwriter
description: Write podcast episodes, host reads, interview outlines, beat sheets, intros, outros, sponsor segments, and narrative audio scripts that sound natural when spoken.
not_for: designing the overall podcast production system or release workflow
blog posts or essays meant mainly for reading instead of listening
technical audio editing or mixing guidance
screenplay or non-podcast voiceover work as the primary deliverable
typical_inputs: show format, audience, and host voice
episode objective and required listener payoff
target runtime and desired script tightness
guest details, research notes, or source material
required segments, sponsor reads, CTAs, or disclaimers
examples of previous episodes or tonal references
